heroSubtitle: Creating history and culture experiences with technology

mission.title: Discover History & Culture
mission.desc1: Through Vietnam's heroic history, told through interactive, vivid, and accessible stories. By combining official historical knowledge with engaging gameplay, the website aims to spark interest in exploring the past.
mission.desc2: Sen not only preserves and spreads ethnic heritage but also nurtures patriotism and a sense of preserving national identity in the digital age.

artifacts.title: Typical Artifacts
artifacts.subtitle: Find and discover valuable historical and fine art collections from museums around the world

gamification.title: Gamification Experience
gamification.subtitle: A journey to decode cultural secrets through a visual and vivid virtual world.
gamification.cardTitle: Experience and learn history - culture through games
gamification.cardDesc1: Welcome players to a new discovery journey. In this game, you will transform into a time traveler, following historical and cultural traces to decode stories, characters, and events that once left their mark in the past.
gamification.cardDesc2: In addition, the integration of exercises and multiple-choice questions designed appropriately for the content helps players reinforce knowledge, increase memory capacity, and deeply understand the historical - cultural values experienced.

cta.desc: Join us to learn about Vietnamese history and culture and receive gifts now

mapSection.title: Explore <1>Heritage</1> & <3>Artifacts</3>
mapSection.desc: A visual journey along the length of the country. Search for historical landmarks and national treasures right on the map.
mapSection.hint: 👆 Click on the map to view fullscreen and zoom

leaderboard.title: Honoring <1>Excellent</1> <3>Explorers</3>
leaderboard.desc: Admire the leading players in the journey of exploring heritage. Do you want your name to be called here? Join now to earn points and rank up!
